a.style: font-family:'Playfair Display', Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Liberation Serif', serif

text.tspan: Estimated number of new cancer cases per 100,000 people, in a given year.
Data source: IHME, Global Burden of Disease (2024)

Note: To allow for comparisons between countries and over time, this metric is
age-standardized
.
Non-melanoma skin cancers
are excluded
due to potentially incomplete records and inconsistent registry practices.
